holdings.infoBox: FDLS is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sanmina stock at 1.76%, Amkor Technology at 1.64%, ArcBest at 1.60%, MYR Group at 1.46%, and Taboola.com at 1.42%.

overview.description: The Inspire Fidelis Multi Factor ETF (FDLS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WI Fidelis Multi-Cap, Multi-Factor index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index that provides exposure to 100 US-listed stocks of various sectors and market capitalizations. Selection is based on high quality, value, and momentum characteristics that include a Christian values component, as defined by the issuer. FDLS was launched on Aug 23, 2022 and is issued by Inspire.
